category_labels.TRANS: Transferable — applies beyond operator's specific context
category_labels.IDIO: Idiosyncratic — true only in operator's configuration
category_labels.REG_INT: Register internal — language native to the system
category_labels.REG_EXT: Register external — language native to the reader

_meta.purpose: Maps each editorial tension to the structural categories it touches. Insights crossing >=2 categories produce annotations on the corresponding pair (e.g. SRC×TRANS = the publishable quadrant).
